## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (updates to README, docs, etc.)
- [ ] 🎨 Styling (formatting, CSS, no functional changes)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (restructuring code, no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 📦 Dependency update

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] I have run `npm run format` to format code
- [ ] No new warnings have been introduced
- [ ] Content is bilingual (GA/EN) where applicable
